title: IT Asset Tracker System
description: A nocode IT asset lifecycle system covering assignment, return, repair, warranty tracking, and movement reports.
description_cn: 面向 IT 资产生命周期的无代码管理系统，覆盖领用、归还、维修、质保和流转报告。
author: NocoBase Team
prompt: Build a NocoBase app — IT Asset Tracker System: asset lifecycle, holder relationships, warranty risk, transfer records, and an activity report. Match the layout and signature visuals of this reference prototype: https://static-docs.nocobase.com/solution/templates/41-it-asset-tracker.html
prompt_cn: 用 NocoBase 搭建一个应用 —— IT 资产管理系统：资产生命周期、持有人关系、质保风险、流转记录和活动报告。布局和标志性视觉参照这个原型：https://static-docs.nocobase.com/solution/templates/41-it-asset-tracker.html
